# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: allow-ssh-from-any
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.{{project_id}}.global.network.default)
      description: "Allow SSH (TCP 22) from any source IP for development testing."
      direction: INGRESS
      sourceRanges: ["0.0.0.0/0"]
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: ["22"]
  - name: allow-rdp-from-any
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.{{project_id}}.global.network.default)
      description: "Allow RDP (TCP 3389) from any source IP for development testing."
      direction: INGRESS
      sourceRanges: ["0.0.0.0/0"]
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: ["3389"]
  - name: allow-http-from-any
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.{{project_id}}.global.network.default)
      description: "Allow HTTP (TCP 80) from any source IP for development testing."
      direction: INGRESS
      sourceRanges: ["0.0.0.0/0"]
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: ["80"]
  - name: allow-https-from-any
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.{{project_id}}.global.network.default)
      description: "Allow HTTPS (TCP 443) from any source IP for development testing."
      direction: INGRESS
      sourceRanges: ["0.0.0.0/0"]
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: ["443"]
